description_long: This bungalow features a linear, elongated layout with multiple connected sections, each with distinct roofing and open-air spaces. The structure is primarily composed of light-colored wood and concrete, with extensive use of glass for windows and doors, creating a modern, airy feel. Lush landscaping surrounds the building, including palm trees, shrubs, and potted plants, enhancing its integration with nature. Several covered patios and pergolas provide shaded outdoor living areas, while the main building mass is complemented by smaller annexes and terraces. The rooflines are predominantly flat, with some sections featuring pergola-style slats for partial shade. The overall design emphasizes openness, natural light, and a seamless transition between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, elongated bungalow with flat roofs, extensive glass, and lush landscaping, featuring multiple patios and pergolas for outdoor living.
description_view_0: This view highlights the full length of the bungalow, showcasing the flat roofs, multiple outdoor patios, and dense landscaping with palm trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: From this end-on perspective, the linear arrangement and depth of the bungalow are visible, with the main entrance and layered outdoor spaces framed by greenery.
description_view_2: This side view emphasizes the connected sections of the bungalow, the variety of rooflines, and the integration of plants along the building's length.
description_view_3: Looking from the opposite end, the open patios, pergolas, and the interplay between built and landscaped areas are prominent, with the main structure receding into the background.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
